caption: Sasha Vayla stalks the neon alley of the futuristic marketplace, her silhouette flickers under holographic billboards as she strides through rain-soaked alleys. Her body is lit by a cascade of neon, her corset shimmering with silver threads and a subtle glow. ⚡💫 #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neonaesthetics
